summary: Fixes maintenance section tabs showing the wrong tool after switching sidebar items, and stops the sidebar and tab bar from shifting into the window title bar.
changed: Maintenance sections keep their own tab selection — switching between Clean My Mac, Developer Projects, and System Cleanup resets to the correct sub-menu
Sidebar title pinned above the menu list so items no longer scroll into the traffic-light buttons
fixed: Developer Projects and other maintenance menus no longer show content from a previously visited section (e.g. Installers appearing under Developer Projects)
Maintenance tab bars and section headers no longer clip at the top of the window when changing sidebar selection
